reason: This is a harmless religious hadith (saying of Prophet Muhammad) about accepting fragrant flowers/perfume. It has no connection to extremism or ISIS. The hashtag refers to Al-Ahly Egyptian football club.
original_post: قال رسول الله ﷺ(من عرض عليه ريحان، فلا يرده، فإنه خفيف المحمل، طيب الريح) رياض الصالحين #الأهلى_المصرى
